offlineQueue.title: Offline Queue
offlineQueue.description: View pending payments, retry them, or sync all.

paymentHistory.title: Payment history
paymentHistory.description: Last 24 hours: view payments, cancel receipts, or issue refunds.
paymentHistory.noRegisterMessage: Please select a cash register under "Register" first or start a shift.
paymentHistory.noRegisterHint: Assign a register first ("Register" section above).

appUpdate.title: App update
appUpdate.description: Checks whether a newer version of the Regkasse POS app is available, downloads the APK and opens the system installer.
appUpdate.androidOnly: In-app updates are only available on Android devices.
appUpdate.upToDate: You are running the latest version.
appUpdate.mandatory: This update is strongly recommended by the vendor.
appUpdate.blocked: This version is no longer supported. Please update the app before continuing.
appUpdate.unknownSourcesNote: Note: "Install from unknown sources" must be allowed on the tablet for the file/share app.

banner.intro: A usable cash register (open) and assignment are required for a fiscally valid payment.

shift.title: Shift
shift.intro: Open and close your shift including cash balance. A register must be assigned for payments.
shift.noRegisterMessage: Please assign or open a cash register first.

dailyClosing.statusBlocked: Daily closing is not available right now
dailyClosing.statusAlreadyClosedToday: Daily closing has already been performed for today. You can still end the shift.
dailyClosing.statusAlreadyClosedOnDate: Daily closing has already been performed for {{date}}. You can still end the shift.
dailyClosing.statusAlreadyClosedAt: Daily closing has already been performed on {{dateTime}}. You can still end the shift.
dailyClosing.statusPaymentsWithoutInvoice: {{count}} payment(s) without invoice — resolve before closing.
dailyClosing.statusRegisterUnavailable: Cash register is not available for daily closing.
dailyClosing.reportDisclaimer:
RKSV-compliant daily closing
Cash Register Security Ordinance (RKSV)
This daily closing is fiscally valid.

registerAssignment.title: Cash Register (POS)
registerAssignment.intro: A currently open register must be assigned for fiscally valid payments. The selection is saved in the profile.
registerAssignment.saveErrorMessage: Assignment was rejected by the server (invalid register, missing permission, or register is not open).

errors.emptyCart: Cart is empty. Add items first.

adminMenu.title: Admin menu
adminMenu.description: Opens management features such as license, RKSV and reports in the admin area.

apiServer.title: API server settings
apiServer.findIpHelp: How do I find my IP address?
apiServer.invalidIpMessage: Invalid IP address format. Please enter a valid IP address.
apiServer.saveSuccessMessage: API server settings saved. You may need to restart the app.
apiServer.searchingMessage: Searching for IP address… This may take a moment.
apiServer.autoFindFailedMessage: No working IP address found. Please enter manually.
apiServer.autoFindErrorMessage: Error while searching for IP address.

offlineQueueScreen.title: Offline queue
offlineQueueScreen.supportText: The replay batch correlation ID links a server replay to payments and logs. Please report this ID (and after successful sync the payment ID) to support — faster than the local queue ID alone.
offlineQueueScreen.operatorHintText: Review open entries here or under Settings and sync first. A second payment for the same table/process may cause duplicate bookings.
offlineQueueScreen.emptyAll: No entries in the offline queue.
offlineQueueScreen.errorIncompleteResponse: Incomplete server response — sync again or contact support
offlineQueueScreen.replayBatchLabel: Replay batch correlation ID (support, best correlation):
offlineQueueScreen.replayBatchPending: Replay batch ID appears after a replay attempt (sync) once the server returns a batch ID.
offlineQueueScreen.syncNoneFailed: No payment synced. {{failed}} failed — check error message or send again.
offlineQueueScreen.syncEmptyMessage: No pending payments in the queue.
offlineQueueScreen.retryFailedMessage: Synchronisation failed. Please check the error message.
